name: cycle
description: Autonomous work-loop driver scoped to the session's ACTIVE DOMAIN (commons @D g58). The WHOLE family now auto-continues to DEPLETION: each round self-feeds from open milestones (else auto-seeds from `## deferred`), self-continues via ScheduleWakeup, and terminates only when open milestones = 0 AND deferred empty AND no other signal — so every command digs the declared backlog to the bottom on its own (per-round cap throttles WIDTH, auto-continue provides DEPTH; user can interrupt any round). Four commands: /cycle — read the active <NAME>.md snapshot, enumerate its open `- [ ]` milestones (off-domain work is forbidden; if no active domain, prompt for `/domain set <NAME>` first); if the next-list is empty, auto-seed ≤N (default 3) candidate milestones — PRIMARY signal = the domain's OWN `## deferred` section (promote the next batch into the milestone board + drain it from deferred so the domain self-feeds its declared backlog), then user hint · prior-turn /gap shortlist · log-tail open thread — via `/domain milestone <text>` per item, then re-enumerate (no-signal case = zero milestones + empty deferred + no signal stops with steer-options rather than fabricating); → dup-race precheck (3-signal grep: INBOX.log.md entry status + merged PR + git log) → parallel-plan table → fan-out (one background Agent per item, same message) → auto-continue to depletion (depletion-driving by default, not single-round-then-stop). /cycle-full — one-time phase-0 depletion brainstorm (rounds until no novel ideas, cap 8) on $ARGUMENTS within the active domain, then the same precheck → plan-table → fan-out → auto-continue tail (phase 0 is one-time per goal; subsequent rounds use plain /cycle semantics, self-feeding from deferred, draining to depletion). /cycle-loop — bare /cycle handed to the `loop` skill for explicit continuous intent + dynamic ScheduleWakeup pacing; same depletion termination (bare /cycle now reaches the same end-state inline — /cycle-loop is the explicit-pacing surface). /cycle-full-loop — /cycle-full once (one-time brainstorm + first fan-out) then handed to /loop /cycle, draining to the same depletion condition. /cycle-all (0.8.2) — like /cycle but with TWO overrides: NO per-round cap (enumerate the FULL open-milestone set + promote the ENTIRE `## deferred` backlog in one round, the `cap>8→confirm` guardrail waived) and NO recommend/select gate (do NOT print a
hand-back — fan out EVERY PROCEED row immediately). For

intent (전부 진행) instead of a curated ≤N batch. /cycle-fg (0.9.0) — FOREGROUND SEQUENTIAL: same Stages 0-3 (SSOT-freshness · next-list · dup-race precheck · plan table) but Stage 4 executes each PROCEED row INLINE in the current session, one at a time, with visible step-by-step progress (`▶ i/N → ✅/⚠/❌`). NO background Agent fan-out · NO parallelism · NO worktree isolation. Halt on failure (sbs-like bar), confirm before irreversible step. Use when you need cycle's auto-enumeration + planning but want to see each item executed in-context (debugging · careful review · single-threaded resource). Trade-off: depth-first sequential cost vs cycle's width-parallel; same depletion auto-continue. All safety/correctness guardrails are KEPT (SSOT-freshness, dup-race SKIP, leak-sweep, resource-contention serialization — fanning out everything still serializes EXCLUSIVE GPU resources, never parallel-fires every Agent — throttle-resilience, auto-continue to depletion). The five commands share the 5-stage structure + plan-table + dup-race precheck + leak guardrails; they differ only in entry/pacing/cap shape. Distinct from all-bg-go (reactive fan-out of PRIOR-turn branches; /cycle self-generates the next batch each round). 0.8.0 fixes the per-round shape + adds THE LINTER (@D round_lint): every loop round ends with a result-report (status glyph + PR# + honest verify tier + 7-element easy + progress bar) → debt/split tracking → a `round-lint: N/10 ✓` self-audit of the 10-point contract → loop tail; plus @D oversized_split (≥2 consecutive throttle deaths on one milestone ⇒ split into independently-landable sub-slices, never re-fire whole) + @D handoff_debt_ledger (cross-repo handoff INBOX edits left uncommitted in a dirty target tree = tracked debt, cleared via isolated worktree). cycle-loop/cycle-full-loop carry the fixed round shape. NL triggers: /cycle · /cycle-full · /cycle-loop · /cycle-full-loop · /cycle-all · /cycle-fg · 사이클 · 계속 진행 · 다음 라운드 · keep cycling · march on · 전부 진행 · 추천 말고 전부 · 사이클 포그라운드 · 사이클 순차 · 사이클 직접 · foreground cycle · sequential cycle · inline cycle · 한 단계씩 사이클.
